name: sh-ast-analyze
description: Not a published package. This file exists only so @microsoft/api-extractor (run from ./api-extractor.json in this folder) reports a distinct docModel/api-report package identity for the `sh-ast/analyze` subpath — API Extractor's CLI derives that identity from the nearest package.json to its config file, and the real `sh-ast` package.json's name would otherwise collide with the root entry point's report/docs output. The real importable specifier is "sh-ast/analyze"; see ../package.json's `exports` map. This folder is not a pnpm workspace member (pnpm-workspace.yaml only globs packages/*, one level up from here).
